docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
